response.original_title: 檻　女囚麗華　収監
response.overview: An isolated island floating across the sea - there was a hell of a name for a women's prison. The sadist's humiliation - Rinchey between the women, the skinny woman, Reika, is imprisoned on the day when such things are in the den of everyday beasts. From time to time, Reika's eyes come to mind the face of her lover - the burning flame - and her beloved sister. Yes, he took revenge on his murdered sister, and Reika was going to give up everything and die quietly. Even in the crazy world, it was Reika who was beginning to develop friendships with female prisoners. But one day, Reika saw the real madness lurking behind the darkness! The identity of the devil who killed his sister - the conspiracy of the despicable director - now he was laughing at the helpless Reika. Eventually, the abominable past is revived, and the flame of revenge begins to burn again in Reika's chest. An impulse that can no longer be stopped! A woman becomes a violent beast for the sake of love!
response.title: 檻　女囚麗華　収監
